programme.desc: With the Decepticons and Autobots allied, both armadas engage in battle in order to save Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead holds synthetic Energon formula Decepticons close in.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Ratchet's experiment with synthetic Energon turns him into a threat to all.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A prophecy wounds a hero and triggers a long-awaited Optimus-Megatron battle.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Aerialbots are thrown back in time to Cybertron's Golden Age.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron becomes infected with cosmic rust, a metal-consuming plague.

programme.title: Tick Tock
programme.desc: When the four ninja follow the mysterious falcon into the woods, they stumble on a hidden work shop where Zane learns the secret about his past and in the process, finally knowing who he is, he is the first ninja to unlock his true potential.

programme.title: Marvel Black Panther Trouble in Wakanda
programme.desc: Being the King of Wakanda is tough -- especially when you're also the Black Panther! When Thanos arrives from outer space and threatens to destroy Earth, the Black Panther leaps into action and defeats him with the help of Earth's Mightiest Heroes. But the situation only gets worse when rogue villains Killmonger and Klaue team up with the Mad Titan to take the fight to Black Panther's homeland! Can the Panther pounce on their perilous plan before Wakanda is pulverized?

programme.title: The Maze Of Amazement
programme.desc: The Knights find themselves trapped in a maze looking for the Book of Deception. But will they actually get their hands on it, or will it keep deceiving them? The Knights travel to the Hill Country in the northern part of Knighton to Axl's home town of DIGGINGTON (where they realize that all of Axl's family look just like him.) While they're there, Merlok 2.0 detects something…one of the Magic Books! It's “The Book of Deception.” They go to find it and discover it ended up under a mountain. And, to make matters worse, the magic book has built a maze around itself to keep it from being found (it is deceptive!) As the NEXO-Knights enter the maze from one side, Jestro enters from the other the Book of Monsters has led him to the maze to get The Book of Deception, too. It's a race through this confusing maze to see who can get the book first. Ava figures out the maze is the Whackman maze from a videogame. After help from Axl's people to defeat Jestro and win the book, the knights discover it's a FAKE BOOK of deception. The Book of Deception created a fake copy of itself!

programme.title: The Hundred Year Moon
programme.desc: At the night of the Hundred Year Moon, the Wolves are running wild and causing havoc. Crooler kidnaps a young gorilla girl to lure Laval, Eris and Gorzan the Gorilla out to rescue her. It is a very dangerous night, but finally Skinnet the Skunk's foul odor may prove useful.

programme.title: Fish Story!
programme.desc: Vic and Owen find themselves, along with Sinjin, in the middle of a massive dino-fight in the old Jurassic Park Visitor Center.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: Their Draconic Majesty's Request
programme.desc: The mystery bounty hunter tracks Ras and Arin to the World Forest, while the Ninja search for the last Prismatic Blade.

programme.title: Crashing Together
programme.desc: Arin must choose between Ras and the Ninja as the battle for the Prismatic Blades rages across the World Forest.

programme.title: Beasts And Dragons, Rise Of Garmadon
programme.desc: Zane, Jay, and Kai remember some of Ninjago's fearsome creatures so that Cole defend the cave from an unidentified monster. But Ninja confront memories of their greatest villain and ally, Garmadon, before the threat to Zane controls him completely.

programme.title: Pteranodon't!
programme.desc: A young park guest accidentally strands himself in the Pteranodon aviary, requiring Owen and a testy Stygimoloch to stage a daring rescue.

programme.title: Boxed in!
programme.desc: Z-Blob returns in a daring rescue to break Mateo out of Dreamsmasher's “box” and helps him find Lunia's hourglass!

programme.title: The Happy App Trap
programme.desc: The Berlin Bright Bureau receives a mysterious package with new “goggles” to help them become more efficient dream chasers, but at what cost?

programme.title: Mission: Ungoggle-able
programme.desc: Mateo, Izzie, Zoey, and Cooper are unwilling participants in a sleep study at Happy App Headquarters, and it's up to the others to break them out!

programme.title: Secret Crush
programme.desc: Aliya and Liann take matters into their own hands as they go undercover to solve the mystery of Ley-La, the secretive and enigmatic figure who's been lurking around the periphery of their lives. Posing as reporters, they dig deep and discover a key clue.

programme.title: Tick Tock
programme.desc: When the four ninja follow the mysterious falcon into the woods, they stumble on a hidden work shop where Zane learns the secret about his past and in the process, finally knowing who he is, he is the first ninja to unlock his true potential.

programme.title: Marvel Black Panther Trouble in Wakanda
programme.desc: Being the King of Wakanda is tough -- especially when you're also the Black Panther! When Thanos arrives from outer space and threatens to destroy Earth, the Black Panther leaps into action and defeats him with the help of Earth's Mightiest Heroes. But the situation only gets worse when rogue villains Killmonger and Klaue team up with the Mad Titan to take the fight to Black Panther's homeland! Can the Panther pounce on their perilous plan before Wakanda is pulverized?

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik plans to block out the sun and extinguish all life and nature on the planet Mobius. Then he creates a robot son and tries to train him in the ways of wickedness.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents an electron altering generator which makes Scratch and Grounder twice as fast as Sonic. When they lose it and Tails picks it up, Tails speeds through the Mobius countryside leaving disasters and accidents in his wake.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik captures a Kangaroo named MacHopper, and uses his "brain-wipe-reprogramming-computer" to transform him into a resourceful demolitions expert (Ala MacGiver).

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outerspace to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik installs a new "obedience microchip" in Scratch and Grounder and orders them to drill for a rare mineral in a tropical mountain. With his Freezomatic machine, Robotnik covers the mountain in ice and runs a Hermit out of his home.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outerspace to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Sonic is almost sucked inside the Void, he finds a huge Ring which Sally believes is an ancient relic but it turns out to be trick of the Sorcerer, Nagus. Sally and Bunnie are drawn inside the Void and when Sonic comes to rescue them, Nagus pretends to be the King so Sonic will use his speed to transport him outside.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When a Rebel Base is threatened by Robotnik, Sonic and Tails team up with Big Mike and Da Bears to run a booby-trapped gauntlet in their gigantic Road Warrior-like truck.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Brandon Quark, an evil half-man, half-duck genius challenges, then teams up with Robotnik to capture Sonic. But Sonic knows their weakness, and pits the Badnik geniuses against one another, and sets himself free.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Wes Weasley returns to the Fortress, Coconuts tricks Robotnik into signing an IOU so he can buy thousands of Mobiums worth of magic tricks to use on Sonic. In the end, Sonic goes free, and Robotnik is forced to pay Wes the massive IOU debt.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic plays Cyrano to bring Robotnik Jr. and Breezie together. The problem is, Breezie's crazy about Sonic. So Sonic gets out of the way, but when he does, Junior is captured by Robotnik, and Breezie comes to the rescue, finally falling for him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Tails invents a Hover-Hanglider for Sonic's birthday, Sonic suggests he assist Prof. Von Schlemmer with his new Robotnik-Nabber machine. Robotnik hears about this, and poses as Von Schlemmer to trick Tails into inventing a Sonic-Nabber instead.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: A female space hunter named Katella, who is capturing animals all over Mobius for a Zoo, teams up with Robotnik and captures Sonic. To Robotnik's great fear, she then plans to marry the eggman!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Journey to the Eastern Caverns
programme.desc: Eli and the Gang find a way to take Junjie back home to the Eastern Caverns-and find a whole bunch of trouble waiting for them when they get there!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Upon returning to the Outlaws' jungle camp, the Shane Gang suffer a sneak attack from the Emperor's Underlord Holt, who steals almost all of their slugs and loads them onto the Dragon Train for transport to the Emperor. With precious few slugs to use as ammo, the Shane Gang must be extra resourceful to get them back.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In order to reach the Emperor of the Eastern Caverns, Eli and Junjie pose as Underlords to enter the Tournament of Underlords.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Blakk has hired Brutale to build a Deep Water Rig to drill for Dark Water at the bottom of the Cavern Sea.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Avalanched inside a frozen cavern, the Shane Gang can't figure out which is worse: being trapped with a vicious Ice Ogre that only gets bigger the more you shoot it?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad is still missing after the slug-out with the Shadow Clan, but the Gang have to set off without him when reports start coming in of slugs disappearing all across the 99 caverns. As they pursue the trail of missing slugs, the mystery grows darker when it leads them straight to Dr. Blakk's old stronghold!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: In a climactic battle, Junjie and Eli confront the Emperor and the Dai-Fu as the fate of the entire Eastern Caverns hangs in the balance!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: While Junjie struggles with the knowledge of what he did during his time as the Dark Slinger, the Shane Gang meet a former servant of the Emperor who wants to turn over a new leaf. But can the Shane Gang help a bad guy learn to do good?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang arrive at a cavern overrun by thieves terrorizing the good townfolk, they decide to use Pronto as bait, hoping the thieves will eliminate each other as each strives to be the first to capture the valuable molenoid-the only one the Eastern Caverns have ever seen. However, their plan goes awry when Underlord Holt arrives and commands the thieves to work together to bring him Pronto-dead or alive!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang travel to the Auroris Mine, they discover a legendary monster carved out of stone attacking the mines-the Pyritor. Trixie studies the legend to help them locate the creature's home and put a stop to its reign of terror, but first they must confront the true nature of the beast, and its assistant!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Determined to up his game against Stone Warriors, Kord visits a famous Eastern Technician for help creating a new blaster upgrade. Building the new upgrade is difficult...but working with the Technician is practically impossible!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.sub-title: The Fall of the Eastern Champion

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: Minuto para ganar
programme.desc: Diez desafíos, un gran premio y sólo una hora para poder obtenerlo son los ingredientes de este divertido concurso conducido por Marco Antonio Regil. Cada noche los concursantes deberán completar disparatados retos en menos de 60 segundos para evitar ser eliminados. Los elementos de uso cotidiano del hogar se convierten en divertidos juegos en donde las alfombras de baño sirven como trineos, los lápices se vuelven complicados aparatos de ingeniería y las latas de refresco son obstáculos de equilibrio. Al final, tendrán que completar el reto de "La moneda millonaria y en menos de 60 segundos deben hacer que una moneda aterrice dentro de un jarro de agua localizado a 4 metros de distancia. Un ingenioso programa de concursos que mantendrá a los televidentes al filo de sus sillas.

programme.desc: Una joven está obsesionada con la muerte de su padre, cree que él quiere comunicarse con ella para darle un mensaje. La joven cree que el mejor amigo de su papá y su mamá son amantes, y que ellos tuvieron que ver con la muerte de su padre.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico descubre que no tiene nada de dinero, el banco los va a embargar y Federica habla con ellos y les dice que Ludovico se murió para que cancelen su deuda, pero asistirán al velorio porque es una muerte muy sospechosa.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludovico no sabe qué regalarle a Federica para su aniversario, se emborracha con Flavio y van a tatuarse los nombres de sus esposas, pero los tatuadores se equivocan y ponen los nombres al revés.

programme.title: La rosa de Guadalupe: Oscuro secreto

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó: Despido injustificado

programme.title: Teresa

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Fernando le promete a Teresa que comprará las acciones de Luna Turquesa para que los socios no la dejen en la calle. Mariano y Aurora pasan tiempo en Zacatecas para comenzar a trabajar juntos.

programme.title: Vencer el pasado: Despido injustificado
programme.desc: Renata busca la manera de demostrar que Alonso le robó su proyecto. Carmen intenta reintegrarse a su círculo social para evitar que la sigan viendo como una mujer traicionada por su marido.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana: Emotivo reencuentro
programme.desc: Ernestina se pone muy feliz de ver a Ana Lucía y le asegura que nunca dejó de buscarla. Ana Leticia se hace pasar por Ana Lucía frente a Ana Laura.

programme.title: Amar a muerte: Encuentro mortal

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico se pelean por la televisión, ella se enoja tanto que avienta el control y la descompone.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Después de que Toña hace cuentas, Rocío descubre que Lucas es producto de una infidelidad porque aún andaba con Paco, así que le pide una prueba de paternidad para verificar que son padre e hijo.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Lorena está cansada de que Frankie no consiga trabajo y a él se le ocurre una gran idea: abrir una academia de actuación basada en el Método Rivers.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: En el edificio se corre el rumor de que Arturo y Lorena son pareja y cuando Magdalena sospecha que Arturo tiene una amante, comienza a pelear por él.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte: Un nuevo amor
programme.desc: Los integrantes de la banda toman caminos separados detrás de sus sueños. Márgara le confiesa a Natasha que todo fue una farsa. Apolinar se entera y termina con ella, para quedarse con Natasha.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano y Vítor conocen a dos mujeres que les hacen creer que están interesadas en ellos, pero solo quieren su dinero.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor acepta tener una cita con una mujer casada y usa a Albertano para distraer a su amiga, pero el esposo de la mujer aparece y tienen que fingir tener una relación.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: La llegada del bebé de Martina a la casa de los López se torna en una pesadilla cuando nadie puede dormir debido al llanto del pequeño. La Nena encuentra mensajes indiscretos en el celular de Aldolfo y cree que le es infiel.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: El hermano perdido y no reconocido de Plácido llega a casa de los López para quedarse. Plutarco olvida el cumpleaños de Gaby y tiene que buscar un buen regalo para compensar su error.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Al intentar limpiar la computadora de Don Justo, Plutarco compra cientos de acciones a su nombre. Justito descubre que Gaby puede jugar ajedrez y la inscriben en un torneo para así solucionar los problemas económicos de los López.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.sub-title: Le toca bailar con la más fea
programme.desc: Don Justo jubila a Plácido y no le da nada de pensión. Los López tratan de buscar una solución para poder vivir ahora que Plácido no tiene trabajo. Plutarco planea exigirle un buen trato a Don Justo.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta busca a Reverte para pedirle que juntos aprendan a tratarse como padre e hija. Santos le dice a Mia que la forma de demostrar amor es perdonando. Mia le pide a Rocco que persiga y grabe a su papá, porque quiere saber quién es su novia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma lleva reporteros al Elite y así obliga a León a no expulsar a ningún alumno y Reverte regresa al colegio Diego le advierte a Javier que lo desenmascarará frente a Roberta Mia discute con Franco por negarse a retirarle su apoyo a Miguel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Franco quiere confesarle a Mia que anda con Alma, pero ella no quiere que Roberta se entere. Franco le ofrece trabajo a Miguel. Alma, celosa de Reverte, le dice a Roberta que si quiere se vaya con él. Javier golpea a Diego y lo deja inconsciente.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta le dice a León que Diego se cayó sólo Javier le confiesa a Reverte que fue él quien le pegó a Diego Sol se enfurece al descubrir que su plan para separar a Tomás y Pilar falló José recibe un correo informándole que su tutor murió.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta cree que Gastón fue quien le envió el correo a José para que deje de investigar sobre él León corre del hospital a Roberta cuando pretendía visitar a Diego Inés y León le dicen a Javier que ingresará a un colegio acorde a su personalidad.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: León le muestra a Diego su oficina, para que empiece a trabajar con él una amiga de Sabrina llama a Miguel para advertirle que no tuvo relaciones sexuales con ella Franco le dice a Alma que no se precipite al ceder la patria potestad de Roberta.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia se entera de que Miguel la engaña y planea su venganza. Alma va a renunciar a la patria potestad de Roberta con tal de que ella sea feliz. Franco habla con Alma y le pide que le dé tiempo a Roberta para que tome la decisión correcta.

programme.title: Amores con trampa: Oferta de negocio
programme.desc: Carmen le pregunta a Felipe si está interesado en Hilda. Facundo le pide a Santiago que le venda las acciones que le quedan de la compañía. Porfirio le confiesa a Conchita que siempre ha tenido la esperanza de volverse a encontrar con su esposa.

programme.title: Qué bonito amor: Compromiso
programme.desc: Coloso le pide a Elvira que se alíen para vengarse de Santos. María recibe una sorpresa por parte de Santos y él le entrega el anillo de compromiso que le dio su madre.

programme.title: Pasión y poder: Perder lo más amado
programme.desc: Erick le dice al juez que Consuelo es amante de Miguel, el hombre que trató de matarlo. Un hombre roba al bebé de Consuelo.

programme.desc: Gardenia sufre al ver a Eduardo besarse con Erika. Fernanda lleva a cabo sus planes para demostrar que Flor no es una estafadora. Jaime le asegura a Fernanda que Flor fue su novia. Steve le pide a Eduardo que no se case con Erika.

programme.title: Esmeralda: Posibilidades
programme.desc: Esmeralda lleva a su bebé al hospital, pues estuvo con fiebre y Álvaro llega preguntando por su hijo, frase que hiere en el orgullo a José Armando.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Camila sigue desaparecida y, junto con otras mujeres, es prisionera de un grupo de piratas. Vasco y Úrsula tienen un encuentro romántico. Camila se hace amiga de Jimena.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana: Conociendo a su familia
programme.desc: Ramiro le cuenta a Mariano que Ana Lucía es amante de Marcelo y que Ana Leticia sabe todo. Orlando le dice a Evaristo que no quiere terminar en la cárcel por la muerte de Daniel y Maribel escucha todo. Mariano se presenta con Ana Lucía como su tío.

programme.title: Los valientes de Guerrero
programme.desc: En un pueblo lleno de odio, donde las peleas con machetes están a la orden del día, un comisario trata de cambiar las costumbres violentas y traer paz.

programme.title: Gavilán o paloma

programme.title: Flor Silvestre
programme.desc: José Luis, hijo de un hacendado, decide ir en contra de su familia casándose con Esperanza, una campesina humilde. Su padre lo echa de la casa para oponerse a la boda y porque se enteró que es parte de la Revolución Mexicana. Unos falsos revolucionarios, invaden la hacienda y asesinan al padre de José Luis, y así comienza una cadena de venganzas y tragedias.

programme.desc: Vladimir humilla a Miguel en la escuela. Él y su hermano lo amenazan con una pistola para darle una lección.

programme.desc: A Toño nada le importa. Su novia secuestra a Rodrigo, el hermano de Toño. Cuando las circunstancias parecen sombrías, Toño mostrará su verdadero valor.

programme.sub-title: Para mal de amores, no hay doctores

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: De mal que el hombre teme, de ese se muere
programme.desc: Melina es hipocondríaca y no disfruta de la vida. Cuando cree tener cáncer visita el hospital y conoce a Martinillo, un médico de la risa.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Jorge y Nico quieren ser populares y forman una banda. Pero Diego, un chico cuyo padre está enfermo, les enseña el sentido real de la música.

programme.sub-title: Mientras más profundo es el río, menos ruido hace
programme.desc: La madre de Paty es una actriz famosa. Por la presión que ejercen sobre ella, se vuelve anoréxica y termina en el hospital.

programme.sub-title: A buen sueño no hay cama dura
programme.desc: Sandra es apasionada del fútbol, pero su mamá quiere que se dedique al modelaje. Sandra demuestra que es capaz de cumplir su sueño.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: A un paso de la final
programme.desc: Los pequeños reciben como invitada especial a Lucero. Albertano pone a prueba la honestidad de los capitanes. Las parejas tendrán que demostrar sus habilidades en una prueba de baile improvisado.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los pequeños llegan a la semifinal y uno de los tres escuadrones sentenciados será eliminado. Prince Royce canta a lado de los pequeños sus mejores éxitos. Los capitanes pasan un día especial junto con los jueces.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Después de diez semanas donde los momentos de diversión, alegría y emoción se hicieron presentes, los pequeños viven el último programa de la competencia con un gran performance al lado de grandes artistas como Paulina Rubio.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Los peligros que existen en los alimentos que se consumen día con día, los diferentes problemas de salud que pueden encontrarse con una mala alimentación. Según los expertos, existen varias alternativas para llevar una vida sana.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una vida llena de cirugías plásticas, lujos, excesos y armas mujeres jóvenes y ambiciosas que están dispuestas a todo por tener una buena vida.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Personas con capacidades diferentes cuentan sus historias de lo que ha sido viajar a bordo de 'La bestia'. Una esperanza de llegar a La Casa Blanca es lo que tienen 'los mutilados'.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una familia con una vida normal cambia de la noche a la mañana cuando el pequeño Oliver es diagnosticado con una agresiva enfermedad. Los padres de Oliver son notificados y comienza el calvario de 36 horas.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Teresa Rodríguez relata la historia de la recaptura de Joaquín Guzmán Loera 'El Chapo'. Desde el escape de 'El Chapo' junto con 'El Cholo' de la casa en Culiacán hasta la captura de ambos delincuentes en un hotel de paso.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Hay veces que las familias son separadas por situaciones fortuitas. Alejandro Muñoz es un periodista cuyo propósito en su programa de televisión es reunir a familias separadas por diversos motivos. Él cuenta algunas de sus experiencias.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La patrulla fronteriza de Estados Unidos tiene registro de que la mayoría de indocumentados que cruzan la frontera son centroamericanos. Dentro de esta población hay muchos menores de edad que viajan solos para reunirse con sus familiares.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: En Nueva York existe una importante cantidad de población inmigrante proveniente de Casa Blanca, un pueblo del estado de Puebla en México. Ellos desean reunirse de nuevo con sus padres después de muchos años de no verlos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La inmigración a Estados Unidos se ha convertido en una industria con un enfoque monetario. En este episodio se dan a conocer las implicaciones monetarias además de los estragos emocionales que deja en los inmigrantes.

programme.title: JUNGWOO 'SUGAR' MV
programme.desc: NCT JUNGWOO's first solo single “SUGAR” is a groovy pop song with swing‑infused drums, a witty bassline, and a smooth, catchy melody. The lyrics send a warm message of gratitude to fans, wishing that past memories and future moments are all sweet. The music video brings this sweetness to life with colorful, sugar-inspired visuals, while the performance highlights JUNGWOO's stylish movements and precise choreography, showcasing his unique stage presence.

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: WayV '白色定格 (Eternal White)' MV
programme.desc: The title track “白色定格 (Eternal White)” is a dance-pop song that blends a rhythmic saxophone riff with energetic drum beats, creating a warm atmosphere through the harmony of powerful rap and sweet vocals. The lyrics express a strong determination to break free from time frozen like a white winter and to keep moving forward, capturing the hearts of listeners..

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Promise' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics, written by DOYOUNG, capture the feelings he couldn't easily express as his love grew deeper. Even if the confession comes late, it delivers a sincerity and emotional resonance stronger than any other words.The title track “Promise” is an impressive ballad that begins with a minimal piano melody and gradually builds emotional depth as strings are added in the latter half.

programme.title: Seun Kuti
programme.desc: Seun Anikulapo Kuti possesses the grace, energy and fury of his father, the legendary artist Fela Kuti. With the musicians of Fela Kuti's legendary band Egypt 80, Seaun Kuti brings the most original incarnation of Afrobeat to life. Digging deep into different African traditions, Seun has brought his own touch to the music by reflecting the difficulties and cultures of the continent. Three-quarters of Egypt 80's current line-up is composed of musicians who didn't only play with Fela Kuti, but often were arrested and harassed alongside the founder of the Afrobeat.

programme.title: Paul Desmond
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: James Brown
programme.sub-title: James Brown - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. Back in 1981, legendary American singer James Brown gave an unforgettable performance at the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. The "Godfather of Soul", "Mr. Dynamite", and "Soul Brother No. 1" was a major force in 20th century popular music, influencing many musicians in numerous genres.

programme.title: John Coltrane, McCoy Tyner, Elvin Jones & Jimmy Garrison
programme.desc: The mere mention of the name John Coltrane evokes a deeply emotional, often spiritual response from even the most casual jazz fan. Dexter Gordon was a fantastic saxophonist. Miles Davis was a genius. Coltrane stood above - he was a visionary, a saint-like figure. By the standards of most jazz musicians, his life was uneventful. Sure, he had a heroin habit for a while, and Miles Davis punched him, but once he'd experienced the “spiritual awakening” described in the liner notes of his 1965 album A Love Supreme, he dedicated himself to his music with extreme single-mindedness. This broadcast of Coltrane's 1965 performance at the short-lived Belgian jazz festival in Comblain-la-Tour features Trane's classic quartet with Elvin Jones (drums), Jimmy Garrison (bass) and McCoy Tyner (piano).

programme.title: Michael Brecker Band
programme.sub-title: Michael Brecker Band - North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1989, decorated American saxophonist and composer Michael Brecker and his band played at the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. Accompanied by bassist Jeff Andrews, drummer Adam Nussbaum, pianist Joey Calderazzo, and guitarist Mike Stern, Brecker displayed his virtuosity in spades.

programme.title: Avishai Cohen
programme.desc: Double bassist Avishai Cohen's trio with Noam David (drums) and Omri Mor (pianist) joined forces with the international Symphony Orchestra ‘INSO-Lviv', conducted by Christian Schumann. On June 24, 2017 they brought Avishai Cohen's signature blend of influences from Eastern Europe, American jazz and the Middle East to the Alfa Jazz Festival in Lviv, Ukraine. Cohen, who also supplies vocalizations in the Judeo-Spanish dialect Ladino, came to prominence internationally in the 1990s when jazz great Chick Corea offered him a place in his trio and a recording deal. Thirty years later, Cohen has become a house-hold name himself, leaving his Ukrainian audience enthralled and connected through the universal language of music.

programme.title: Manu Dibango, Daniel Rallo, Jerry Malekani & Frederic Gaillardet
programme.sub-title: Soul Makossa: Manu Dibango in Stuttgart
programme.desc: Manu Dibango, one of Africa's biggest musical stars and top saxophonists, is an indispensable artist. He was one of the first African musicians to score a worldwide hit with his 1972 release “Soul Makossa”, paving the way for many other artists. The very concept of world music owes much to him. A superb stage performer with great communicative humour, Dibango is above all one of the founding fathers of a modern African musical style that is open to jazz, R&B, salsa, gospel, funk, and reggae. This concert showcases all these genres, and features an excellent line-up of musicians from the four corners of the planet.

programme.title: Isabelle Faust
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Leonard Slatkin, Leonard Slatkin, Orchestre National de Lyon & Baiba Skride
programme.desc: Leonard Slatkin conducts the Orchestre national de Lyon in a concert recorded at the Auditorium de Lyon in France, 2013. The concert is a tribute to the organ of the Maurice-Ravel Auditorium, which was made by Aristide Cavaillé-Coll. The program features three works which premiered on exactly the same organ: Camille Saint-Saëns' Cyprès et Lauriers and Symphony No. 3 and Poulenc's Concerto for Organ, Timpani and Strings. Soloist is Vincent Warnier.

programme.title: Julijana Sarac
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Raphael Pichon, Ensemble Pygmalion, Sabine Devieilhe & Arnaud de Pasquale
programme.sub-title: Mozart - A Gala for the Weber Sisters
programme.desc: On March 23, 1783, Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart gave a successful concert at Vienna's Burgtheater that he dedicated to two sopranos: Aloysia and Josepha Weber, the sisters of his wife Constanze. The concert's program would be considered odd by today's standards. The composer's Symphony No. 35 was broken up and interspersed with other compositions, such as concertos, arias, and works for solo piano. Nearly two and a half centuries later, French soprano Sabine Devieilhe, conductor Raphaël Pichon and his Ensemble Pygmalion bring a wonderful concert inspired by that remarkable event. The program includes: ‘Allegro con spirito' of Symphony No. 35, also known as the Haffner Symphony ‘Vorrei spiegarvi, oh Dio', KV 418 ‘Schon lacht der holde Frühling', KV 580 Trio of ‘Die Schlittenfahrt' No. 3, KV 605 Deutscher Tanz No. 6, KV 571 ‘Der Hölle Rache kocht in meinem Herzen' from Mozart's opera Die Zauberflöte ‘Finale: Presto' of Symphony No. 35 ‘Nehmt meinen Dank', KV 383 and ‘Dans un bois solitaire et sombre', KV 308. This performance was recorded at Théâtre Impérial de Compiègne, in Compiègne, France.

programme.title: Les Dissonances & David Grimal
programme.sub-title: Schubert - String Quartet No. 15 in G major
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances' string quartet – consisting of David Grimal (violin), Hans Peter Hofmann (violin), David Gaillard (viola), and Xavier Phillips (cello) – performs Franz Schubert's String Quartet No. 15 in G major, D. 887, Op. 161. Schubert composed this work, his final string quartet, in a mere ten days in June 1826. However, this highly original piece, characterized by its restless shifts between major and minor, was not published until after Schubert's death in 1851. This performance was recorded at Cité de la Musique in Paris, France, in 2014.

programme.title: The Philharmonics
programme.desc: Chamber music ensemble The Philharmonics pays tribute to the music of Vienna in this March 9, 2011 concert from Vienna's Café Sperl. The ensemble, which consists of musicians from the Vienna Philharmonic and the Berlin Philharmonic, performs arrangements of five popular waltzes by Johann Straus II. Among them are Kaiser-Walzer, Op. 437, and Schatz-Walzer, Op. 418, from the operetta The Gypsy Baron. In May 1921, the likes of Arnold Schönberg, Alban Berg, and Anton Webern wrote these chamber music arrangements to raise funds for their Society for Private Musical Performances. Although both the concert and the auction of the scores were very successful, the Society eventually went under. In addition to these pieces by Strauss, The Philharmonics perform works by Fritz Kreisler, Leopold Godowsky, as well as The Philharmonics's first violinist, Tibor Kováč. The program comes to an end with Godowsky's tribute to the city: Alt Wien.

programme.title: amarcordplus & Sebastian Heindl
programme.sub-title: Baroque choral music by Bach, Schütz et al.
programme.desc: Five-strong vocal ensemble amarcord is joined by an extra alto and two soprano voices for this unusual concert at Leipzig's St. Thomas Church. As amarcordplus, the ensemble presents a program focused on the city of Leipzig, which includes sacred madrigals by Johann Hermann Schein, motets from Heinrich Schütz's collection Geistliche Chor-Music, as well as two motets by the most famous Thomaskantor: Johann Sebastian Bach. Moreover, various sacred works by lesser-known contemporaries Philipp Heinrich Erlebach and mononymous composer Liebhold are performed, in addition to compositions by other members of the Bach family, including Johann Michael Bach and Johann Christoph Bach. This performance was recorded on May 1, 2020.

programme.title: Duane Allman
programme.desc: Duane Allman, the lead guitarist and driving force behind Southern Rock pioneers The Allman Brothers Band, lived a tragically short life, but during his brief career he changed music forever. With contributions from an illustrious and highly knowledgeable cast of friends, insiders and experts, plus rare footage and exclusive interviews, this film looks at Duane's life, work and musical output.
